name: Zero Risk — Client Onboarding E2E v2 (Webhook: Deal Won)
description: E2E onboarding workflow triggered on new deal (GHL opportunity = Won). Auto-populates Client Brain (brand, ICP, competitive landscape, VoC). Co-creates success plan with client. Sets activation milestones + TTV targets. Handoff to Account Manager when health ≥ Yellow.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "contact_id": "{{ $json.primary_contact_id }}",
  "event_title": "🚀 Kickoff Call: {{ $json.client_name }}",
  "duration_minutes": 60,
  "scheduled_at": "{{ new Date(Date.now() + 3*24*60*60*1000).toISOString() }}",
  "description": "Welcome to Zero Risk! Let's align on your success plan, introduce the team, and answer questions."
}

={
  "contact_id": "{{ $json.primary_contact_id }}",
  "title": "Account Manager Handoff: {{ $json.client_name }}",
  "description": "Onboarding initiated. Client Brain auto-populated. Success plan drafted in Notion. Kickoff call scheduled. Ready for Account Manager ownership after kickoff confirmation + champion map.",
  "due_date": "{{ new Date(Date.now() + 5*24*60*60*1000).toISOString().split('T')[0] }}",
  "priority": "high"
}
